findings.title: Floating promise: cartPage.removeItem() not awaited before assertion

evidence.summary: cartPage.removeItem() call changed from awaited to unawaited — the removal fires asynchronously and the assertion runs before the item is removed

findings.why_it_matters: Without await, the removeItem() call starts but does not complete before the next line runs. The toContainText assertion executes against the DOM in its pre-removal state, making the test unreliable — it may pass or fail depending on timing.

findings.title: Floating promise: cartPage.applyDiscount() not awaited before assertion

evidence.summary: cartPage.applyDiscount() is called without await — the discount may not be applied when the price assertion runs

findings.why_it_matters: Same issue as f-1. The totalPrice assertion runs before the discount application completes, causing a race condition that produces intermittent failures.

top_risks: tests/cart.spec.ts introduces two unawaited Playwright calls that create race conditions — assertions run before the triggered actions complete
